message:
fix(engine): support mixed ESM/CJS cycle live bindings in Bun-compat mode and handle JSON surrogate pairs

Two independent fixes:

ESM/CJS interop (esm_cjs_interop_parity + matrix + tests):
  The cycle_mixed_esm_cjs specimen now expects Success (not CycleDetected)
  under Bun-compat mode, matching Bun's behavior of preserving live binding
  cells through the sync bridge. run_single_specimen() gating changed from
  unconditional early-return on cycle_count > 0 to only early-returning
  when expected_outcome == CycleDetected. The specimen gains expected
  binding states (a.mjs:x and b.cjs:y both Initialized).

  module_compatibility_matrix_v1.json updated: node_behavior corrected to
  throw_err_require_esm (Node rejects require(ESM)); native/node_compat
  behaviors aligned; explicit bun-compat shim added with waiver; divergence
  block documents Bun-only live binding behavior.

  New tests: mixed_cycle_preserves_live_bindings, inventory_reports_mixed_cycle,
  default_matrix_pins_mixed_cycle_contract_and_bun_shim,
  mixed_cycle_bun_compat_interop_evidence_matches_matrix_contract.
  Existing scenario_report test updated for BunCompat mode observation.

stdlib JSON surrogate pair handling:
  unescape_json_string() now handles UTF-16 surrogate pairs (\uD800-\uDBFF
  followed by \uDC00-\uDFFF) by combining high and low surrogates into
  the correct code point. Lone surrogates fall back to U+FFFD replacement
  character instead of returning an error, matching JSON.parse() behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -103,19 +103,35 @@
       "case_id": "esm-cjs-cycle-live-binding",
       "feature": "dual_mode",
       "scenario": "An ESM <-> CJS mixed cyclic graph preserves live binding semantics without snapshotting stale exports.",
-      "node_behavior": "preserve_live_bindings_through_cycle",
+      "node_behavior": "throw_err_require_esm",
       "bun_behavior": "preserve_live_bindings_through_cycle",
-      "franken_native_behavior": "preserve_live_bindings_through_cycle",
-      "franken_node_compat_behavior": "preserve_live_bindings_through_cycle",
+      "franken_native_behavior": "throw_err_require_esm",
+      "franken_node_compat_behavior": "throw_err_require_esm",
       "franken_bun_compat_behavior": "preserve_live_bindings_through_cycle",
-      "explicit_shims": [],
+      "explicit_shims": [
+        {
+          "shim_id": "shim-bun-esm-cjs-cycle-live-binding-v1",
+          "mode": "bun_compat",
+          "description": "Explicit Bun-compatible sync bridge keeps mixed ESM/CJS cycle bindings live across the require() boundary.",
+          "removable": true,
+          "test_case_ref": "lockstep/module/esm-cjs-cycle-live-binding"
+        }
+      ],
       "lockstep_case_refs": [
         "lockstep/module/esm-cjs-cycle-live-binding"
       ],
       "test262_refs": [
         "language/module-code/instn-named-iee-cycle.js"
       ],
-      "divergence": null
+      "divergence": {
+        "diverges_from": [
+          "bun"
+        ],
+        "reason": "Native mode preserves strict ERR_REQUIRE_ESM behavior at the CommonJS -> ES module boundary, so mixed cycles only stay live under the explicit bun_compat bridge.",
+        "impact": "Packages that rely on Bun's mixed ESM/CJS cycle bridge must opt into bun_compat or refactor the cycle to a single module system.",
+        "waiver_id": "waiver-modcomp-esm-cjs-cycle-live-binding-bun",
+        "migration_guidance": "Break the mixed cycle or move the boundary to dynamic import() in native/node_compat; use bun_compat only as an explicit transitional bridge."
+      }
     },
     {
       "case_id": "external-extension-probe-package-root-relative-require",
